stem: The function f(t) = 720·0.5t/18 models the intensity of an X-ray beam, in number of particles, t millimeters below the surface of a sample of copper. According to the model, what is the estimated number of particles in the X-ray beam when it is at the surface of the sample of copper?
rationale: Choice B is correct. The surface corresponds to t = 0 millimeters below the surface. Substituting t = 0 into f(t) = 720·0.5t/18 gives f(0) = 720·0.50 = 720·1 = 720. The other choices come from misreading the formula.
